raw_responses.title: Position-Aware Depth Decay Decoding D3 (2503.08524)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: position-aware depth decay; tokens at different positions in decoder use different depth allocation; ~0.7 depth needed per token in generation phase.

raw_responses.title: Mixture-of-Depths Dynamically Allocating Compute (2404.02258)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: dynamically allocate FLOPs to specific positions in sequence + across layers; top-k routing chooses tokens for compute at each layer; non-uniform per-position allocation.

raw_responses.title: Subjective Depth Timescale Transformers (2511.21408)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: Bayesian-surprise dynamic routing within decoder-only transformers; fixed-capacity Top-K routing based on Bayesian surprise; lightweight prior.

raw_responses.title: D-LLM Token Adaptive Compute Allocation (NeurIPS 2024)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: dynamic per-token compute resource allocation paradigm; some words allocated less compute.

raw_responses.title: NVIDIA TensorRT LLM Skip Softmax
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: skip softmax sparse attention; skip compute on negligible attention blocks; integrated into FlashAttention kernel.

raw_responses.title: Dynamic Token Halting LLM Inference (2506.22396)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: dynamic token halting; per-token early exit; non-uniform compute per position.

raw_responses.title: HiP Attention Hierarchical Sparse Attention Pruning (2406.09827)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: hierarchical attention pruning + sparse sub-quadratic; dynamic skip-mask attention.

raw_responses.title: FlashMask Flexible Attention Mask PaddleNLP
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: flexible attention mask supporting non-uniform per-position skip; gated mask paradigm.
